title: How the arxiviq model is trained: method, recipe, and evidence
subtitle: The org recipe behind arxiviq.com, with the dated evidence that supports each choice. Every claim here traces to a row in EVIDENCE.md. Nothing is shipped on a hypothesis.

recipe.rollbackCriteria: Revert if rotating-slice nDCG drops >0.02 vs charter baseline.

timeline.headline: Root cause fixed; trigger bug identified
timeline.detail: Encoder effective-rank collapse traced to a projector-window trigger bug, not the contrastive loss. Re-run with the fixed trigger.

timeline.headline: Three-tier spectral surgery REJECTED
timeline.detail: Original ASN weight-space SVD surgery makes collapse worse in a real collapse regime (served rank 3.4 → 1.0; kNN −12–21pts). Archived.

timeline.headline: Loss-space rank floor (VICReg) SUPPORTED
timeline.detail: VICReg prevents collapse where it occurs (non-contrastive / low-negative regimes). Neutral on standard InfoNCE real-text. Kept as insurance.

timeline.headline: Real-text validation: VICReg neutral; domain fine-tune beats SOTA in-domain
timeline.detail: AG News kNN 0.892 / nDCG 0.822 after fine-tune. Per-tenant domain fine-tuning is the defensible moat: it beats general commercial embeddings in-domain with no OOD forgetting. Reconfirmed 2026-06-28.

timeline.headline: Tenant corpus vs commercial baseline (Phase A fleet)
timeline.detail: Barlow Twins top method in Bayesian TPE search (robust 1.42, #1 of 6). Matryoshka (MRL) truncation training promoted, the real lever for cheap truncated serving. int8 quantized serving essentially lossless (kNN_int8 ≈ kNN_full).

timeline.headline: Large-scale VICReg campaign (500 runs)
timeline.detail: VICReg rank floor confirmed regime-specific: +0.32 kNN for SimSiam, ~0 for InfoNCE batch≥16. Not a default term; insurance only.

timeline.headline: Eval gate now fails closed
timeline.detail: Removed the silent demo-pair fallback in core-api eval. Gates cannot pass on hard-coded demo pairs; MIN_REAL_PAIRS_EVAL=8 enforced. Deploy spine is honestly certifying.

deployGates.rule: nDCG ≥ 0.35 (k=2 proxy; k=10 benchmark pending exam port)
knn_t8 ≥ 0.30 AND (knn_full − knn_t8) ≤ 0.05; fail-closed if unmeasured
